active_gate: none — Gate 223 complete on work/gate-223-successor-boundary-and-light-retarget-20260406; Gate 224 not yet activated

global_rules.controlled_multi_gate_condition: Codex may continue gate-to-gate without operator relay only if each gate closes, merges, and no stop condition fires.

leaves.title: Create successor-local archive-evidence destination and move manifest
leaves.objective: Create the successor-local archive-evidence destination, write a manifest that preserves decision ids, evidence anchors, and disagreement memory, and wire the destination into the active cleanup pack without touching the source repo.
stop_conditions: archive destination would need to be the source repo
archive destination cannot preserve evidence-anchor lineage cleanly

leaves.title: Move historical planning-governance and review-planning receipt tests out of active tests
leaves.objective: Execute the move for `planning_governance__closed_source_or_historical_pack_receipts` and `review_or_trace__historical_planning_review_receipts`, preserving evidence memory in the archive destination and removing those files from active runtime proof slices.
stop_conditions: a moved file is still needed by a live successor runtime family and no replacement anchor exists

leaves.title: Move historical closeout-receipt tests out of active tests
leaves.objective: Execute the move for `migration_or_closeout_guard__historical_closeout_receipts` into the successor-local archive-evidence destination, preserving the execution-memory trail and removing those files from the active test surface.
stop_conditions: a closeout-receipt test turns out to police a still-live successor seam not covered elsewhere

leaves.title: Close Gate 222 as archive-only move gate
leaves.objective: Update the quartet, execution log, and gate state so Gate 222 closes truthfully as the archive-evidence move gate with Gate 223 next.
stop_conditions: quartet closeout cannot represent Gate 222 state truthfully

leaves.title: Rewrite retained cutover-boundary test for successor-local truth

leaves.title: Repair fallout only for declared keep-as-is families

leaves.title: Confirm runtime-scenario and keep-as-is families remain green after cleanup fallout

leaves.title: Freeze executed-row state and terminal retained-test surface
leaves.objective: Update the cleanup-pack execution state so executed move / retire / rewrite / retarget rows are explicit, untouched keep-as-is rows remain explicit, and no second cleanup pack is implied silently.

leaves.title: Close the cleanup pack and leave the repo architecture-ready
leaves.objective: Close the cleanup pack truthfully with either no active pack routed or an explicit architecture-planning-ready hold state, but do not open a fresh cleanup pack.
stop_conditions: closeout would require inventing a new active cleanup gate
